summary: Comprehensive mobile UI/UX audit completed on 390x844 viewport (iPhone 14 Pro equivalent). All major pillar pages tested and mobile experience is excellent.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Mobile UI audit completed successfully. All pillar pages (/dine, /learn, /fit, /celebrate, /farewell, /travel, /shop, /paperwork) load correctly on mobile. Key findings: 1) Hamburger menu opens/closes properly with all pillar links visible in 2-column grid, 2) Restaurant cards display in 2x2 grid with readable text, 3) Reservation modal form is single column on mobile with 16px font inputs, 4) Trainer cards show horizontal compact layout with photo/name/title/rating, 5) Training bundles are clickable and open cart drawer, 6) Fit page shows correct fitness products (not pupcakes), 7) All buttons have 44px+ touch targets, 8) Mira AI chat opens full-screen on mobile, 9) All input fields have 16px font preventing iOS zoom.

mobile_audit_results.hamburger_menu: PASS - Opens/closes properly, shows all pillar links in 2-column grid
mobile_audit_results.restaurant_cards: PASS - 2x2 grid on mobile, readable text, Reserve buttons visible
mobile_audit_results.reservation_modal: PASS - Single column form on mobile, 16px font inputs, all fields accessible
mobile_audit_results.trainer_cards: PASS - Horizontal compact layout with profile photo, name, title, rating
mobile_audit_results.training_bundles: PASS - Clickable cards, Add to Cart works, opens cart drawer
mobile_audit_results.fit_page_products: PASS - Shows fitness products (Tunnel Kit, Fitness Collar, Exercise Vest, etc.) NOT pupcakes
mobile_audit_results.product_cards: PASS - Readable text, 2-column grid, prices visible
mobile_audit_results.modals: PASS - Reservation modal displays correctly on mobile
mobile_audit_results.button_touch_targets: PASS - All buttons have minimum 44px touch targets
mobile_audit_results.form_inputs: PASS - All inputs have 16px font (prevents iOS zoom)
mobile_audit_results.cross_page_navigation: PASS - All pillar pages load without errors
mobile_audit_results.mira_ai_orb: PASS - Visible on all pages, Talk to Mira button works, chat opens full-screen
